Sun god, king of gods. Travels across sky in solar barque. Often depicted with falcon head and sun disk. Creator deity.
Egyptian

God of death, afterlife, resurrection, agriculture. Murdered by brother Set, resurrected by Isis. Judge of the dead. Green-skinned, mummified
Egyptian

Goddess of magic, motherhood, healing, protection. Wife of Osiris, mother of Horus. Known for powerful magic and devotion.
Egyptian

God of sky, kingship, protection. Falcon-headed. Son of Osiris and Isis. Avenged father's death against Set. Associated with pharaohs.
Egyptian

God of chaos, storms, desert, violence, foreigners. Murdered Osiris. Battles Horus. Red-haired, animal-headed (unidentified creature).
Egyptian

God of mummification, death, afterlife. Jackal-headed. Guides souls to judgment. Protects graves and embalming process.
Egyptian

God of wisdom, writing, knowledge, moon, magic. Ibis or baboon-headed. Scribe of gods. Inventor of hieroglyphs.
Egyptian

Goddess of home, fertility, cats, protection, joy. Cat-headed or depicted as a cat. Protector deity, daughter of Ra.
